fields.name: back-path
fields.label: Back Path
fields.description: Where to navigate when BACK is clicked. Use a full AEM path (e.g. /content/<site-name>/language-masters/<language-node>/cart).

fields.name: continue-path
fields.label: Continue Path
fields.description: Where to navigate after CONTINUE. Use a full AEM path (e.g. /content/<site-name>/language-masters/<language-node>/order-summary).

fields.name: show-loyalty
fields.label: Show Loyalty Field
fields.description: Shows the loyalty program opt-in checkbox in the account section.

fields.name: loyalty-label
fields.label: Loyalty Label
fields.value: I want to join Luma+ Loyalty Program
fields.description: Label text for the loyalty program checkbox.

fields.name: showcardnumberfield
fields.label: Show Card Number Field
fields.description: Adds a card number input to the payment section when enabled.

fields.name: custom-class
fields.label: Custom class
fields.description: Space-separated class names to add to the block
